arts.ttl: Juventus vs Stuttgart: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Juventus are hunting their third straight win to kick off the Champions League league phase as they take on Stuttgart in Turin on Tuesday night. Thiago Motta's Juve have been defined by their vintage defensive resilience at the start of the new manager's tenure, and they produced an impressively controlled display at the weekend to edge past ten-man Lazio 1-0 in Serie A.
